nodes.label: Operation succeeds?
nodes.detail: try { const PouchDB = (await import('pouchdb-browser')).default; const PouchDBFind = (await import('pouchdb-find')).default; PouchDB.plugin(PouchDBFind); this.db = new PouchDB('chat_v1'); await this.db.createIndex({ index: { fields: ['child_id'] } }); await this.db.createIndex({ index: { fields: ['timestamp'] } }); await this.db.createIndex({ index: { fields: ['sync_status'] } }); this.initialized = true; } catch (err) { console.error('PouchDB initialization failed:', err); }

nodes.label: Operation succeeds?
nodes.detail: try { return await this.db.put(doc); } catch (err: any) { if (err.name === 'conflict') { const existing = await this.db.get(doc._id); return await this.db.put({ ...doc, _rev: existing._rev }); } throw err; }

nodes.label: Call this.db.find()
nodes.detail: const result = await this.db.find({ selector: selector, // Remove sort from query to avoid index mismatch errors // limit/skip still work but sort is safer in memory for PouchDB });

nodes.label: // Sort in memory: newest first (descending timestamp)

nodes.label: Call docs.sort()
nodes.detail: docs.sort((a, b) => new Date(b.timestamp).getTime() - new Date(a.timestamp).getTime());

nodes.detail: try { let docsToDelete; if (child_id) { const result = await this.db.find({ selector: { child_id: child_id }, fields: ['_id', '_rev'] }); docsToDelete = result.docs; } else { const result = await this.db.allDocs({ include_docs: false }); // Filter out design docs docsToDelete = result.rows .filter((row: { id: string }) => !row.id.startsWith('_design/')) .map((row: { id: string; value: { rev: string } }) => ({ _id: row.id, _rev: row.value.rev })); } const deletedDocs = docsToDelete.map((doc: { _...

nodes.label: Call this.db.find()
nodes.detail: const result = await this.db.find({ selector: { child_id: child_id }, fields: ['_id', '_rev'] });

nodes.label: Call this.db.allDocs()
nodes.detail: const result = await this.db.allDocs({ include_docs: false });

nodes.label: Call result.rows .filter((row: { id: string }) => !row.id.startsWith('_design/')) .map()
nodes.detail: docsToDelete = result.rows .filter((row: { id: string }) => !row.id.startsWith('_design/')) .map((row: { id: string; value: { rev: string } }) => ({ _id: row.id, _rev: row.value.rev }));

nodes.label: Call docsToDelete.map()
nodes.detail: const deletedDocs = docsToDelete.map((doc: { _id: string; _rev: string }) => ({ ...doc, _deleted: true }));

nodes.label: Operation succeeds?
nodes.detail: try { await this.db.destroy(); this.db = null; this.initialized = false; } catch (err) { console.error('Error destroying database:', err); throw err; }

nodes.label: Operation succeeds?
nodes.detail: try { const result = await this.db.find({ selector: { sync_status: 'pending' } }); return result.docs as LocalMessage[]; } catch (err) { console.error('Error getting unsynced messages:', err); return []; }

nodes.label: Operation succeeds?
nodes.detail: try { const result = await this.db.get(localId); return result as LocalMessage; } catch (err: any) { if (err.status === 404) return null; console.error('Error getting message by local ID:', err); return null; }

nodes.label: Call console.error()
nodes.detail: console.error('Error getting message by local ID:', err);

nodes.label: Operation succeeds?
nodes.detail: try { const doc = await this.db.get(id); doc.sync_status = status; doc.is_synced = status === 'synced'; if (supabaseId) doc.id = supabaseId; return await this.db.put(doc); } catch (err) { console.error('Error updating sync status:', err); }

nodes.label: Operation succeeds?
nodes.detail: try { const doc = await this.db.get(id); return await this.db.remove(doc); } catch (err) { console.error('Error deleting message:', err); }

nodes.label: Operation succeeds?
nodes.detail: try { const result = await this.db.allDocs({ include_docs: true, descending: true }); return (result.rows.map((row: any) => row.doc) as LocalMessage[]) .sort((a, b) => new Date(b.timestamp).getTime() - new Date(a.timestamp).getTime()); } catch (err) { console.error('Error getting all messages:', err); return []; }

nodes.label: Call this.db.allDocs()
nodes.detail: const result = await this.db.allDocs({ include_docs: true, descending: true });

nodes.label: Call (result.rows.map((row: any) => row.doc) as LocalMessage[]) .sort()
nodes.detail: return (result.rows.map((row: any) => row.doc) as LocalMessage[]) .sort((a, b) => new Date(b.timestamp).getTime() - new Date(a.timestamp).getTime());
